workflow_checks.name: demo_login
workflow_checks.detail: Demo account filled, login submitted, redirected to notes list with 8 notes

workflow_checks.name: note_view
workflow_checks.detail: Note editor page loaded with Markdown preview rendering

workflow_checks.name: note_share
workflow_checks.detail: Share link generated, accessible without login, content fully rendered

workflow_checks.name: share_unauthenticated
workflow_checks.detail: Share page accessible after logout, all Markdown content visible

screenshots.name: login
screenshots.description: Login page with dark theme, centered card, form fields

screenshots.name: notes
screenshots.description: Notes list with 3-column grid, search, tag filters, 8 cards

screenshots.name: share
screenshots.description: Public share page with full Markdown rendering, checkboxes, blockquote

visual_review.summary: All three pages (login, notes list, share) pass visual review. CSS fully loaded, dark theme consistent, layouts centered, all content visible and readable, no overlapping/truncation/blank areas. Markdown renders correctly with headings, lists, checkboxes, and blockquotes.
